final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing WeChat Official Account article cover for a fragrance new product launch titled "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香".

Style/medium: premium aesthetic editorial cover, high-end luxury feel
Composition: centered composition, title as the focal point
Subject: fragrance product launch "染秋" (autumn-inspired scent), title "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香" prominently featured
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: elegant, refined, sophisticated autumn atmosphere
Color palette: warm autumn tones (amber, rust, gold, deep burgundy), premium muted palette
Materials/textures: subtle paper grain or fabric texture for tactile luxury feel
Text (verbatim): "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香"
Constraints: title must be the visual focal point, 900x500 aspect ratio, suitable for WeChat article header
Avoid: cluttered layout, overly bright or saturated colors, generic stock photo aesthetic
